cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem. So Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so I need to figure out which one is correct. First, let me clarify the timeline. If the flight is booked for tomorrow, then "today" must be the day before that. So if the flight is on July 29, 2002 (tomorrow), then today is July 28, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today, which would be July 28 minus seven days. Let me count backwards. Starting from July 28, 2002, subtracting one week (7 days) would take me to July 21, 2002. Because July has 31 days, so July 28 minus 7 days is July 21. Let me check that again. July 28 minus 7 days: July 28 - 1 day = July 27 July 27 - 1 day = July 26 July 26 - 1 day = July 25 July 25 - 1 day = July 24 July 24 - 1 day =
